channel.title: Outreaches on IID@Yale
channel.description: Recent content in Outreaches on IID@Yale

item.title: Outreach
item.description: Service: Amin Karbasi is (was/will be) on the following program committees: ICML 2013, 2015, 2015, 2017, 2017, 2018 (area chair), 2019 (area chair) Neural Information Processing Systems (NIPS), 2013, 2014, 2016, 2018 (area chair) SIAM Data mining Conference 2018 ACM SIGKDD Conference on Knowledge and Discovery, and Data Mining (KDD) 2017, 2018 ACM/SIGMETRICS, 2015, 2016 AAAI, 2015, 2016, 2017, 2018 International Joint Conference on Artificial Intelligence (IJCAI), 2016 Workshops Amin Karbasi co-organized Discrete Structures in Machine Learning workshop at NIPS 2017.
